subcodes.first_line: O ye handmaidens, who are near-drawn to the Court of the All-Glorious! Upon you have descended manifold afflictions and calamities, trials and tribulations [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیزان مقرب درگاه کبریا بجمیع مصائب و بلایا و محن و رزایا که بر شما وارد
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @high station of the true believer, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
